turns.speaker: Claudio
turns.text: It's late on a Monday, and here's a song that moves with your breath.

turns.speaker: Claudio
turns.text: Back in 1971, David Gates picked up a nylon-string guitar and let every line end in a whisper.

turns.speaker: Claudio
turns.text: You'll feel yourself lift off the ground a little.

turns.speaker: Claudio
turns.text: After a long day with Claude Code, just breathe.

turns.speaker: You
turns.text: The static demo is online first. The local AI station comes next.

turns.speaker: You
turns.text: Playlist data, taste notes, weather, schedule, and feedback will become the context.

turns.speaker: Claudio
turns.text: For now, this player is the shell: voice, music, transcript, waveform, and mood.
